title: Introducing Brand Studio: The creative production platform powered by your brand
summary: We’re excited to introduce Brand Studio by Stability AI, the end-to-end creative production platform powered by your brand.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: AutoClaw launched
summary: Zhipu AI highlights AutoClaw as a new product that can be installed on any computer in about one minute. It is presented as part of the company's native product lineup.

title: GLM-5-Turbo announced
summary: GLM-5-Turbo is introduced as a foundation model optimized for agent scenarios, with deep training-level improvements to tool use and long-horizon task execution. Zhipu positions it as part of its next-generation full-stack large model system.

title: GLM-5 released as a flagship agent foundation model
summary: Zhipu AI presents GLM-5 as its new flagship base model for agent engineering, claiming open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities. The page also states that GLM-5 performs strongly on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0, comparable to Claude Opus 4.5.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model announced
summary: GLM-4.6V is described as a globally competitive 100B-class open-source visual reasoning model. Zhipu says it achieves same-scale SOTA visual understanding accuracy, supports native tool calling, automatic task completion, and 128K context.

title: AutoGLM agent model introduced
summary: AutoGLM is presented as an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. Zhipu says it addresses task planning, data scarcity, and strategy optimization while supporting continuous self-improvement.

title: CogAgent-9B open-sourced as the base model for GLM-PC
summary: Zhipu announced that it open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC, to support the broader large-model agent ecosystem. The model, identified as CogAgent-9B-20241220, is trained from GLM-4V-9B and is designed for agent tasks using only screenshots as input.

title: GLM-OS concept unveiled with AutoGLM and GLM-PC
summary: On November 29, Zhipu formally proposed the GLM-OS concept and released two agent products: AutoGLM and GLM-PC. This announcement frames the company’s push into agent operating systems and computer-use AI.

title: Agent OpenDay showcased new AutoGLM and GLM-PC progress
summary: At Zhipu's Agent OpenDay, the company announced that AutoGLM can autonomously execute more than 50 steps and perform tasks across apps, while also enabling fully automated web browsing on supported sites. Zhipu also said GLM-PC entered internal testing as a computer-use agent product.

title: Seed3D 2.0 Released
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed3D 2.0, highlighting higher precision and greater usability. The release appears as a new model update on the company's blog.

title: Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM Introduced
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, emphasizing attentive listening, robust interference suppression, and more natural interaction. It is presented as a new speech model announcement.

title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opened
summary: ByteDance Seed announced that its 2027 Foundation Model campus recruitment program is now open, including internships. This is a company recruiting announcement rather than a product launch.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Released on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the release of the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model on Arena. The post indicates an early preview availability for the model.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. The announcement marks a major model release from the company.

title: Seedream 5.0 Lite Introduced
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, describing it as offering deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The post presents it as a new model release.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. The announcement identifies it as a new model release on the blog.

title: Seed Prover 1.5 Announced
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, focused on advanced mathematical reasoning through a novel agentic architecture. It is presented as a specialized model update.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major platform milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent it says marks the start of an era focused on delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames the product as a practical enterprise AI application rather than a research demo.

title: 01.AI's LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. The certification signals external validation for the company’s enterprise AI infrastructure offering.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source Mixture-of-Experts LLM highlighted
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as a global state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts large language model under its Yi open-source lineup. The mention indicates a named model release or flagship model announcement from the company.

title: Kazakhstan President Tokayev meets with 01.AI CEO Kai-Fu Lee
summary: 01.AI highlighted a meeting between Kazakhstan President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev and CEO Kai-Fu Lee. The item is a notable company news event signaling high-level international engagement.
